blockers_encountered.description: tests/test_s3_logger.py modified by the linter between Read and Edit (file-state-changed error on the async test re-point).
blockers_encountered.resolution: Re-Read the file and re-applied the exact edit; verified via re-run (16 passed).

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Re-pointed all test_s3_logger.py tests that called the deleted _build_record/log_success_event/log_failure_event/async_log_success_event through a _record() helper that builds the event and calls record_event(); assertions preserved. The async-delegation test (test_async_delegates) became test_record_event_buffers (s3 sink only buffers; async delegation now owned by the recorder seam).
Added a finally-clear of the proxy_s3_logger singleton buffer in test_s3_sink_fires_on_sync_dispatch to avoid module-singleton residue at atexit flush.
agent_verify_result: pass — targeted+proxy+recorder suites 163 passed; full no-network suite 2533 passed (1 pre-existing failure: tests/test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb, fathomdb optional dep not installed; confirmed failing on baseline via git stash, unrelated to this pack).
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.4-MIGRATE-s3 on branch worktree-agent-a011448f98d86d414 at f808509cb7385cd8e27071a13005a9f924224341; review, verify, merge. Note registered behavior change: s3 opt-in moved from config-callback-entry to AIRLOCK_ENABLE_S3_LOGGER env flag (DOCS owns the register entry).
